name: Get: Sign in: Check of loging in with leaving the Library Card field empty
fullName: Book detail view screen: Get: Sign in: Check of loging in with leaving the Library Card field empty

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for "Brain" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  Sing in screen is opened
When  Enter a valid Password for "LYRASIS Reads" library on Sign in screen
Then  Sign in button is disabled on Sign in screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get: Sign in: Check of loging in with leaving the Library Card field empty

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Get: Sign in: Check of loging in with leaving the Library Card field empty
